/usr/bin/c++ "CMakeFiles/gravity-sim.dir/external/glad/glad.c.o" "CMakeFiles/gravity-sim.dir/src/Circle.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gravity-sim.dir/src/EBO.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gravity-sim.dir/src/VAO.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gravity-sim.dir/src/VBO.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gravity-sim.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/gravity-sim.dir/src/shaderClass.cpp.o" -o gravity-sim  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
